title: ION queue pack example
objective: Demonstrate a bounded two-step queue pack import.

steps.title: Scope the work
steps.prompt: Act as a cautious ION browser carrier. Summarize the requested work, list confirmed facts, list assumptions, identify missing context, and stop with the smallest safe next action.

steps.title: Review the result
steps.prompt: Review the previous answer for unsupported claims, authority drift, missing validation, and unclear next steps. Return findings first, then a concise corrected action plan.
